name: Churu Cat Treats Tuna Recipe With Clam Flavor 4 Tubes
shortDescription: Churu Cat Lickable Treats Tuna with Clam 4 tubes of creamy, grain-free puree made with real tuna and natural clam flavor. Hydrating, low-calorie, with taurine and vitamin E for healthy, happy cats.
description: Bring the taste of the sea to your cat’s day with Churu Tuna with Clam! These creamy, lickable purée tubes are made with real tuna and natural clam flavor, delivering irresistible protein-packed flavor. Each tube contains 91% moisture and only 6 calories, making it a hydrating, low-calorie snack that’s perfect as a treat, food topper, or interactive feeding straight from the tube. Key Benefits : Grain-Free & Delicious: Made with real tuna and natural clam flavor no grains, artificial colors, or preservatives Interactive Feeding: Lick straight from the tube, lap from a bowl, or mix into kibble/wet food Supports Hydration: 91% moisture helps cats stay hydrated and supports urinary health Nutritious & Healthy: Added vitamin E and taurine support heart, vision, and immune health Fun & Easy: Tear, squeeze, and feed as a treat, snack, or meal topper Guaranteed Analysis Crude Protein (min): 7.00% Crude Fat (min): 0.20% Crude Fiber (max): 0.30% Moisture (max): 91.00% Vitamin E (min): 310 IU/kg Taurine (min): 0.025% Calorie Content: 430 kcal/kg | 6 kcal per tube (ME) Net Weight: 2.0 oz (0.5 oz × 4 tubes) Feeding Instructions Feed as a treat only. Not intended as a complete meal. Always provide fresh water and consult your veterinarian regularly. Storage Instructions Refrigerate after opening and serve as soon as possible.
